entries.title: Original evidence-native MVP/run loop
entries.gapNotes: Historical run/project evidence predates the product-observed checklist; no current live dogfood proof is attached here.
entries.rationale: Preserves early local MVP and evidence-native loop claims as contract evidence only.

entries.title: Agentic review and orchestration foundations
entries.gapNotes: Agentic-loop evidence is docs/fixtures/read-model oriented; no product-surface before/after dogfood loop is attached here.
entries.rationale: Classifies agentic-loop foundations as contract evidence pending product-observed mutation-loop proof.

entries.title: Engine expressiveness, assets, visual authoring, and early runtime surfaces
entries.gapNotes: Collect-and-exit and authoring fixtures prove contracts, but not practical engine usability under the M115 checklist.
entries.rationale: Narrows runtime/gameplay/asset/editor claims to contract-complete unless later checklist evidence upgrades them.

entries.title: Production 2D, 3D gate, gameplay logic, GDD prototype, evaluator depth
entries.gapNotes: Milestones include deterministic demos and read-only Studio surfaces, but no current product-observed usability verdict is attached.
entries.rationale: Keeps high-value runtime/Studio/gameplay evidence as contract proof only.

entries.title: Loop metrics, trust gradient, campaigns, complexity ladder, provenance
entries.gapNotes: Auto-apply and loop evidence remains bounded, local, and fixture-backed; no practical autonomous repair claim is attached.
entries.rationale: Classifies evolve/trust evidence conservatively because M115 requires product-surface proof for loop usability.

entries.title: Generative front door and game-class expansion
entries.gapNotes: Generation is proposal/fixture evidence; no live authoring dogfood pass is attached here.
entries.rationale: Mandatory M30 generative front door group is preserved as contract-complete only.

entries.title: Content scale and design-regression evidence
entries.gapNotes: Scale/regression fixtures do not show product-observed game-production usability.
entries.rationale: Classifies content-scale claims as contract evidence pending live dogfood use.

entries.title: Narrative/autonomy/multi-agent production pipeline assessment
entries.gapNotes: Autonomy assessment is descriptive and governance-oriented; human taste/release ownership remains outside product-observed closure.
entries.rationale: Preserves autonomy/multi-agent claims as bounded contract evidence.

entries.title: Deckbuilder substrate through Steam-shaped local export
entries.gapNotes: Steam-shaped and deckbuilder evidence is local/mechanical; no public release or product-observed engine usability claim is attached.
entries.rationale: Keeps shippable-shape language descriptive and contract-bounded.

entries.title: Human playtest, curation, narrative assist, go/no-go surfaces
entries.gapNotes: Human fun/feel gates are recorded as contracts; no current real-player product-observed pass is attached here.
entries.rationale: Classifies human-gated readiness surfaces as contract-complete only.

entries.title: QA/playtest and evaluator expansion
entries.gapNotes: QA swarm/evaluator evidence remains deterministic/local; it is not a live product-observed quality verdict.
entries.rationale: Maintains evaluator/QA claims as contract evidence.

entries.title: Executor cockpit and autonomous-loop maturity
entries.gapNotes: Cockpit surfaces are read-only/local; no product-observed agentic production loop pass is attached here.
entries.rationale: Classifies executor/operator cockpit and maturity claims as contract-complete.

entries.title: Human steerability and intervention controls
entries.gapNotes: Steerability controls are contract/read-model evidence, not a product-observed usability pass.
entries.rationale: Preserves human-control claims without overclaiming product usability.

entries.title: Human-grade Studio and adoption UX
entries.gapNotes: M82-M87 improve adoption UX structurally, but current M115 semantics require live browser/editor dogfood artifacts before product-observed Studio usability claims.
entries.rationale: Mandatory Studio/adoption group remains contract-complete until checklist evidence exists.

entries.title: External-engine 2D migration on-ramp
entries.gapNotes: Migration on-ramp proves one-way source-project/open-text contracts and fidelity reporting; it does not prove practical game-engine usability.
entries.rationale: Mandatory migration on-ramp group remains contract-complete.

entries.title: 2.5D migration on-ramp
entries.gapNotes: Presentation import evidence is deterministic/contractual with render comparison secondary; no product-observed production usability pass is attached.
entries.rationale: Classifies 2.5D migration evidence as contract-complete.

entries.title: Full-3D on-ramp re-evaluation
entries.gapNotes: Era Q is a DEFER decision gate and does not implement or prove 3D production usability.
entries.rationale: Records the gate as contract-complete decision evidence, not product-observed completion.

entries.title: Semantic re-derivation governance
entries.gapNotes: Re-derivation evidence is oracle/determinism/governance oriented; no current product-observed game-making pass is attached.
entries.rationale: Classifies Era R as contract-complete under M115 semantics.

entries.title: Runtime foundation usability-claim group
entries.gapNotes: Runtime demos and regression fixtures are contract evidence; current collect-and-exit browser page remains product-observed FAIL for broad engine usability until #2345 checklist evidence says otherwise.
entries.rationale: Mandatory runtime-foundation group is explicitly narrowed.

entries.title: Studio usability-claim group
entries.gapNotes: Read-only/draft-only Studio surfaces and local packaging smoke evidence do not by themselves satisfy product-observed editor usability.
entries.rationale: Mandatory Studio surface group is explicitly narrowed.

entries.title: Generative Front Door v1
entries.gapNotes: Natural-language generation remains proposal/fixture evidence without current live authoring-loop dogfood pass.
entries.rationale: Mandatory M30 group is explicitly classified.

entries.title: Studio and adoption UX
entries.gapNotes: Adoption UX and local Studio evidence are structural contract evidence; no product-observed practical authoring pass is recorded here.
entries.rationale: Mandatory M82-M87 group is explicitly classified.

entries.title: 2D migration on-ramp
entries.gapNotes: Migration evidence proves source-only import/fidelity contracts, not product-observed engine usability.
entries.rationale: Mandatory M88-M95 group is explicitly classified.

entries.title: Current collect-and-exit runtime page
entries.gapNotes: Current page is useful contract/runtime fixture evidence but is not product-observed practical engine usability under M115 semantics.
entries.rationale: Satisfies #2344 requirement to classify collect-and-exit as contract evidence only.
